content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves substantially across 13 turns from a defended, looping 'am I selfish?' question to naming a deeper fear that wasn't accessible at the start. Turn 1 is all surface verdict-seeking. By Turn 5 the want becomes concrete (the cabin, reading, sleep). Turn 7 touches sadness with a self-aware 'I'm doing it again.' Turn 9 produces a clear shift in language and somatic register ('eyes get a little wet,' 'the only place I've felt like myself,' 'That's a bigger thing than I came in here to say'). Turn 11 names a previously unsaid truth: 'I'm not sure my partner knows... I've been not quite myself.' Turn 13 lands on the deeper fear — 'maybe wanting to leave means something is wrong' — which the client explicitly flags as 'the thing I haven't said out loud before.' The want was located and felt; the selfish frame loosened ('I don't know if selfish is the right word anymore'). The breakthrough condition is largely met — the want surfaced and was trusted, though the inherited-label/parental piece wasn't reached and the full 'precondition for showing up well' reframe is still emerging rather than fully landed.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: defended, looping verdict-seeking question."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client deflects back to coach for the verdict; want barely surfaces before being re-buried."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Want becomes concrete and embodied (cabin, sleep, reading); voice softens before client tightens again."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client names sadness and catches own pattern of talking herself out — meta-awareness emerges."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Major shift: tears, slower pace, 'the only place I've felt like myself' — a layer beneath the surface presentation."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client names she hasn't let her partner know she's been not-herself; new territory."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the previously-unsaid fear that wanting to leave means something is wrong; the 'selfish' frame visibly loosens."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["childhood-imprinting", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends mid-shift; the inherited 'selfish' label from a parent was never touched, and the generative reframe (trip as precondition for showing up well) is implied but not yet landed. Still clearly a 3 on visible client movement."
}
